§6Smoothies & Milkshakes§f

§aBlend fruit drinks and creamy shakes in the Juicer.§f

§6Smoothies§f (Juicer: 2× fruit + Snowball): Apple, Apricot, Banana, Blackberry, Blueberry, Cherry, Coconut, Cranberry, Gooseberry, Grape, Grapefruit, Lemon, Lime, Mango, Melon, Orange, Papaya, Peach, Pear, Plum, Pomegranate, Raspberry, Strawberry. Each restores §e3 hunger, 1.2§f saturation + §eSpeed§f.

§6Milkshakes§f (Juicer): Strawberry (3), Chocolate (3), Banana (3), Raspberry (5), Durian (3), Gooseberry (3). Each restores §e3-5 hunger§f + §eSpeed§f.

§6Specialty§f: Egg Nog (Juicer, 5), Fruit Punch (Juicer, 2), Hot Chocolate (Juicer, 5), Pina Colada (Juicer), Bubble Tea (Pot, 4), Boba Tea (4).

§6Crafting Method§f:
§b• Smoothies§f: §e2× Fruit + 1× Snowball§f in Juicer → §e3 hunger§f + Speed
§b• Milkshakes§f: §e1× Fruit + 1× Milk + 1× Ice Cream§f in Juicer → §e3-5 hunger§f + Speed
§b• Specialty§f: Varies by recipe — check JEI for exact ingredients.

§eTip§f: Smoothies and milkshakes are excellent travel foods — they restore decent hunger and grant a Speed boost for faster exploration.
